info.name: Meetzy API
info.description: Postman collection for Meetzy app — Auth Login, Profile Update, and Video Calling. Total: 6 requests.

item.name: 1. Auth — Login
item.description: Single endpoint handles all auth flows — new user, profile setup, and returning user. token_id is always required. All other fields are optional. Flutter navigates based on isProfileComplete in the response.

request.description: Checks if a user already exists in the database by verifying their Google ID token.

exec: console.log('isProfileComplete: true → Flutter goes to Home Screen');
console.log('isProfileComplete: false → Flutter shows Profile Setup Screen');

request.description:
One API for all Flutter auth scenarios. token_id is always required. All other fields are optional.

──────────────────────────────────────────
USAGE GUIDE
──────────────────────────────────────────

Scenario A — Login Screen (new or returning):
Send only token_id. Remove all other fields.
→ New user:       isProfileComplete: false → show Profile Setup Screen
→ Returning user: isProfileComplete: true  → go to Home Screen

Scenario B — Profile Setup Screen:
Send token_id + display_name + gender + country_name + country_code.
→ Backend saves profile, isProfileComplete: true → go to Home Screen

──────────────────────────────────────────
FLUTTER NAVIGATION RULE
──────────────────────────────────────────
if (res.data.user.isProfileComplete == false) → Profile Setup Screen
if (res.data.user.isProfileComplete == true)  → Home Screen

──────────────────────────────────────────
EXPECTED RESPONSE
──────────────────────────────────────────
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "isNewUser": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbG...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbG...",
    "expiresIn": 604800,
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "email": "nirav@gmail.com",
      "displayName": "John Doe",
      "photoUrl": "https://...",
      "gender": "male",
      "countryName": "India",
      "countryCode": "IN",
      "isVip": false,
      "isOnline": true,
      "isProfileComplete": false,
      "walletBalance": 0,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```
Logs out the current user, invalidates the access token in Redis, and sets their online status to false.

item.name: 2. Profile Update
item.description: Use GET first to load current data, then PATCH to send only the fields that changed. All PATCH fields are optional.

request.description:
Returns the full profile of the currently logged-in user.

Note: Response is wrapped inside a data object alongside refreshed access and refresh tokens.

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "...",
    "refreshToken": "...",
    "expiresIn": 604800,
    "user": {
      "id": 6,
      "googleId": "111590874060848869509",
      "email": "vajanirav2003@gmail.com",
      "displayName": "Nirav Vaja",
      "bio": "Software Developer | Video chat enthusiast",
      "photoUrl": "https://...",
      "gender": "male",
      "countryId": 13,
      "country": {
        "id": 13,
        "name": "Bahrain",
        "code": "BH",
        "dialCode": "+973",
        "flag": "🇧🇭"
      },
      "countryName": "Bahrain",
      "countryCode": "BH",
      "isVip": false,
      "isOnline": true,
      "isBanned": false,
      "isProfileComplete": true,
      "fcmToken": null,
      "coins": 0,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-02T12:40:52.632Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-02T15:03:33.000Z",
      "photos": [],
      "wallet": { "balance": 0, "currency": "coins" }
    }
  }
}
```

Updates user profile. All fields are optional — send only what changed.
Returns the updated User object (no success wrapper).

query.description: Optional: number of users to fetch

request.description:
Returns a randomized list of active online users for the radar home screen.

Filters:
- gender=all (Default): returns 80% female and 20% male, shuffled randomly.
- gender=female: returns only females.
- gender=male: returns only males.
Purges the authenticated user account and all of their related transactional data, photos, gifts, messages, and calls from both the MySQL database and Redis states.

item.name: 3. Video Calling
item.description:
Video calling uses 1 HTTP route + 2 WebSocket namespaces.

HTTP: GET /users/:id — loads partner info on call screen.
WebSocket /matchmaking — finding, ringing, accepting, skipping.
WebSocket /call — join room, WebRTC SDP/ICE relay, end or skip call.

request.description:
Loads partner's public info (name, photo, country, gender) to show on the call screen overlay.
Set the `partnerId` collection variable to the partner's user ID before running.

════ WEBSOCKET — NOT A REST API ════

Namespace: /matchmaking
Handles: finding users, ringing, accepting, declining, cancelling, skipping.

──────────────────────────────────────────
HOW TO TEST IN POSTMAN
──────────────────────────────────────────
1. Click New → WebSocket Request
2. URL: ws://localhost:3001/matchmaking
3. Headers → add:  Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
4. Click Connect

──────────────────────────────────────────
EVENTS TO SEND: FLUTTER → BACKEND
──────────────────────────────────────────

► match:findUser  (User A clicks Connect button — no body)
→ Backend picks a random available user (User B)
→ User B receives ◄ match:incomingCall
→ User A receives ◄ match:calling

► match:acceptCall  (User B taps Accept)
{ "callId": "uuid" }
→ Both receive ◄ match:callAccepted with roomId

► match:declineCall  (User B taps Decline)
{ "callId": "uuid" }
→ User A receives ◄ match:callDeclined

► match:cancelCall  (User A cancels before B responds)
{ "callId": "uuid" }
→ User B popup dismissed ◄ match:callCancelled

► match:next  (after call:skipConfirmed — find next user)
(no body)
→ Immediately finds another random user to ring

► match:backToAvailable  (after call ends, re-enter pool)
(no body)

──────────────────────────────────────────
EVENTS RECEIVED: BACKEND → FLUTTER
──────────────────────────────────────────

◄ match:incomingCall  (to callee User B)
{
  "callId": "uuid",
  "caller": {
    "id": 1,
    "displayName": "John",
    "photoUrl": "https://...",
    "bio": "...",
    "gender": "male",
    "country": { "name": "India", "code": "IN" }
  }
}

◄ match:calling  (to caller User A)
{
  "callId": "uuid",
  "calleeId": 2
}

◄ match:callAccepted  (to BOTH users)
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-id",
  "partnerId": 2,
  "iceServers": [
    { "urls": "stun:stun.l.google.com:19302" },
    { "urls": "turn:...", "username": "meetzy", "credential": "..." }
  ]
}
→ Save roomId → connect to /call WebSocket

◄ match:callDeclined   { "message": "User declined your call" }
◄ match:callCancelled  { "callId": "uuid" }
◄ match:callExpired    { "message": "Call request expired or cancelled" }
◄ match:noUsersAvailable  { "message": "No users are available right now." }
◄ match:partnerLeft    { "roomId": "uuid" }  ← partner disconnected

════ WEBSOCKET — NOT A REST API ════

Namespace: /call
Handles: joining a room, WebRTC SDP/ICE relay, ending or skipping a call.
Backend does NOT process video — only relays SDP and ICE signals between peers.

──────────────────────────────────────────
HOW TO TEST IN POSTMAN
──────────────────────────────────────────
1. Click New → WebSocket Request
2. URL: ws://localhost:3001/call
3. Headers → add:  Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
4. Click Connect

──────────────────────────────────────────
EVENTS TO SEND: FLUTTER → BACKEND
──────────────────────────────────────────

► call:join  (send immediately after match:callAccepted)
{ "roomId": "{{roomId}}" }
→ When both users joined:
→ User A ◄ call:ready { isInitiator: true  } — creates SDP offer
→ User B ◄ call:ready { isInitiator: false } — waits for offer

► call:sdpOffer  (User A sends, isInitiator only)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "sdp": { "type": "offer", "sdp": "v=0\r\no=- ..." }
}
→ Relayed to User B  ◄ call:sdpOffer

► call:sdpAnswer  (User B sends after receiving offer)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "sdp": { "type": "answer", "sdp": "v=0\r\no=- ..." }
}
→ Relayed to User A  ◄ call:sdpAnswer

► call:iceCandidate  (both users send, multiple times)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "candidate": {
    "candidate": "candidate:123...",
    "sdpMid": "0",
    "sdpMLineIndex": 0
  }
}
→ Relayed to other user  ◄ call:iceCandidate
→ WebRTC peer connected — video starts

──────────────────────────────────────────
ENDING THE CALL
──────────────────────────────────────────

► call:end  (End Call button pressed)
{ "roomId": "{{roomId}}" }
→ BOTH users receive ◄ call:ended
→ BOTH navigate to Home Screen
→ Duration saved to MySQL
→ No one is auto re-queued

► call:skip  (Swipe right-to-left)
{ "roomId": "{{roomId}}" }
→ Skipped user  ◄ call:skipped  → goes to Home Screen
→ Swiping user  ◄ call:skipConfirmed
→ Swiping user then sends match:next on /matchmaking
→ Backend rings another random user

──────────────────────────────────────────
EVENTS RECEIVED: BACKEND → FLUTTER
──────────────────────────────────────────

◄ call:ready
{ "roomId": "uuid", "isInitiator": true }

◄ call:sdpOffer   { "from": 1, "sdp": { ... } }
◄ call:sdpAnswer  { "from": 2, "sdp": { ... } }
◄ call:iceCandidate  { "from": 1, "candidate": { ... } }

◄ call:ended
{ "by": 1, "roomId": "uuid", "reason": "ended_by_user" }

◄ call:skipped
{ "by": 1, "roomId": "uuid", "message": "Your partner skipped to the next user" }

◄ call:skipConfirmed
{ "roomId": "uuid" }

◄ call:error  { "message": "Room not found" }
◄ call:ended  { "by": 1, "roomId": "uuid", "reason": "partner_disconnected" }

──────────────────────────────────────────
FULL SEQUENCE SUMMARY
──────────────────────────────────────────
1.  /matchmaking: A → match:findUser
2.  /matchmaking: B ← match:incomingCall
3.  /matchmaking: B → match:acceptCall
4.  /matchmaking: Both ← match:callAccepted { roomId }
5.  /call:        Both connect and → call:join { roomId }
6.  /call:        A ← call:ready { isInitiator: true }
               B ← call:ready { isInitiator: false }
7.  /call:        A → call:sdpOffer
8.  /call:        B ← call:sdpOffer
9.  /call:        B → call:sdpAnswer
10. /call:        A ← call:sdpAnswer
11. /call:        Both ↔ call:iceCandidate (multiple)
12. WebRTC connected — video starts

End call:  → call:end   → both ← call:ended  → Home Screen
Swipe next: → call:skip → skipped ← call:skipped → Home Screen
                         swiping ← call:skipConfirmed
                         swiping → match:next → rings next user
